data.title: FTX/Alameda address unstaked 186,000 SOL, worth about $21.56 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to PeckShieldAlert monitoring, the FTX/Alameda related addresses have released the pledge of 186,000 SOL, which is approximately US$21.56 million at the current price.

data.title: North Carolina proposes to allow crypto assets to be used for tax payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: North Carolina legislators proposed the Digital Asset Freedom Act (H.B. 920), which intends to allow the use of crypto assets in tax payments and other economic transactions. The bill stipulates that qualified digital assets must have a market value of at least US$750 billion, a daily trading volume of no less than US$10 billion, and a history of public market operations of more than 10 years and censorship resistance. At the same time, they are required to be decentralized, have no pre-mining, no internal allocation, and no centralized control. The bill does not explicitly mention specific assets such as BTC. Previously, the state has proposed a number of currency-related bills, including allowing state finance officials to invest in Bitcoin and invest part of their pensions in crypto assets. (The Block)

data.title: Trump Praises Musk During White House Meeting
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump expressed his admiration for Elon Musk during a White House cabinet meeting on April 10. In Musk's presence, Trump stated, "I don't need Elon to do anything; I just happen to like him." He praised Musk for his excellent work and revealed that he had purchased a red Tesla Model S at the highest price to show his support for Musk.

data.title: Babylon (BABY) is now available on Gate.io Launchpool
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io will start BABY staking mining from 15:00 on April 11 to 15:00 on April 18 (UTC+8). Staking BABY, BTC, and USDT to participate in Launchpool can share 1,600,000 BABY airdrops for free. Among them, the BABY mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 1062.67%, the BTC mining pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 10.41%, and the USDT new user pool is expected to reach an annualized rate of 127.52%. Early staking is now open.

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Possibly affected by the official abolition of the IRS DeFi broker rules, CRV briefly broke through 0.6 USDT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that, perhaps affected by the official abolition of the IRS DeFi broker rules, CRV briefly broke through 0.6 USDT and is now quoted at 0.599 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 18.54%. 
Earlier news, US President Trump has signed a bill to officially abolish the IRS (Internal Revenue Service) DeFi crypto broker rules. This is the first cryptocurrency bill signed into law by the president.
